name: GEOSPACE TECHNOLOGIES CORP
summary: Geospace Technologies Corporation designs and manufactures technology solutions across three segments: Smart Water, Energy Solutions, and Intelligent Industrial. Products include Hydroconn smart water connector cables, Aquana remote shutoff valves, wireless seismic data acquisition systems (Pioneer, OBX, Mariner), OptoSeis fiber optic sensing, SADAR border/perimeter security systems, Heartbeat Detector technology, imaging products, and specialized contract manufacturing services. The company serves water utilities, oil and gas, defense, and industrial markets.

products.name: Hydroconn
products.description: Waterproof connector cables used in Automated Meter Reading (AMR) and Advanced Metering Infrastructure (AMI) applications.

products.name: Aquana
products.description: Remote disconnect water valves and IoT platform for leak/burst monitoring and remote water shutoff.

products.name: Pioneer
products.description: Ultralight wireless land-based seismic data acquisition sensor product.

products.name: OBX
products.description: Ocean bottom wireless seismic data acquisition system deployable in unlimited channel configurations.

products.name: Mariner
products.description: Cable-free four-channel autonomous shallow water ocean bottom seismic recorder, deployable to 750 meters for up to 70 days.

products.name: Mariner Deep
products.description: Deepwater wireless seismic acquisition node operable for 200 days in water as deep as 3,450 meters.

products.name: OptoSeis
products.description: Fiber optic sensing technology for high-definition permanent reservoir monitoring on land and ocean-bottom applications.

products.name: Insight by OptoSeis
products.description: Passive all-optical downhole sensor network with no electronics downhole, rated for 150C environments.

products.name: SADAR
products.description: Proprietary real-time detection system for border/perimeter security, tunneling detection, and movement monitoring.

products.name: Heartbeat Detector
products.description: Heartbeat detection security technology identifying people hidden in vehicles, proven 99% effective by national laboratories.

products.name: Seismic borehole acquisition systems
products.description: Fiber optic augmented wireline systems for reservoir monitoring including hydraulic fracturing measurement.

products.name: Imaging products
products.description: Electronic pre-press products using direct thermal, direct-to-screen, and digital inkjet technologies for graphics and printing industries.

products.name: Hydroconn
products.description: Smart water connector cables used in AMR/AMI applications for remote utility meter data collection.

products.description: Remote shutoff water valves and IoT platform for leak/burst monitoring in multi-family and commercial properties.

products.name: Pioneer
products.description: Ultralight land-based wireless (nodal) seismic data acquisition sensor system.

products.description: Ocean bottom wireless seismic data acquisition system deployable in unlimited channel configurations.

products.description: Passive, all-optical downhole sensor network for high-temperature applications up to 150C.
